Class RefinedSeedResult

Namespace
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Skills
Assembly
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.dll

The output of Federation Board refinement. Contains both the structured seed data and the sealed IntentEnvelope ready for injection into the PMCRO workflow.

EconomicPreCheck
Envelope

The sealed IntentEnvelope ready for the PMCRO workflow. Always set after RefineAsync() returns — never null on the happy path.
